summary: Iter65 — Redesign-with-AI: history + revert. Backend pytest 7/7 PASS, frontend UI fully verified end-to-end (suggestion chips, multi-line textarea, submit disabled <5 chars, history strip with per-row Revert, real revert POST returns 200 with {ok:true, reverted_to:<vid>}, and the revert pushed the current jsx back into history as a new row — confirming reversibility). Share + tabs regression intact. Public-URL smoke checks (credits/balance, exchange/listings, waitlist) all 200.
critical_code_review_comments: AppViewer.jsx is ~548 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold but still reasonable. Consider extracting the Redesign panel (lines 230-350) into a sub-component if it grows further.

lead-responder-official mini-app preview surfaces a Tailwind CDN + Babel-standalone in-browser-transform warning. Expected for the sandbox iframe runtime, but worth noting — those are dev-only warnings.
Cloudflare beacon script blocked by the page's CSP (third-party analytics; non-blocking). Not introduced by this PR.
redesign-history endpoint correctly strips full app_jsx from the listing payload and returns only jsx_size + metadata — good payload hygiene.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily pushed 2 history entries into bot_projects.frontend.history for lead-responder-official, exercised the revert (which appended a 3rd 'Revert -- Add a sidebar nav' entry containing the prior jsx), then re-ran /app/backend/scripts/seed_official_agents.py to restore Lead Responder's seeded state. DB is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesign panel renders below the AppViewer header when [data-testid=app-viewer-redesign-toggle] is clicked. To exercise the history strip without a real LLM call, push entries directly: db.bot_projects.update_one({'app_slug': SLUG}, {'$push': {'frontend.history': {version_id, prompt, app_jsx, manifest, created_at}}}). The revert flow uses window.confirm — Playwright must register a 'dialog' handler BEFORE clicking [data-testid=history-revert-{vid}]. After running, re-seed via /app/backend/scripts/seed_official_agents.py to leave Lead Responder pristine.

frontend_redesign_panel.suggestion_chip_click_populates_textarea: Add a sidebar with quick navigation links
